utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 of these items are present. Each includes the required details: health_coverage includes both physical and mental health insurance with costs; property_coverage includes home/contents coverage with costs; travel_coverage includes travel insurance with costs; additional_services includes enhancement services with coverage details and implied costs/inclusion status; total_budget includes a monthly and annual cost breakdown. Therefore, all 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three main policies and two add-ons, all from the provider 'LifeFirst'. To find their ratings, we match each coverage component to the corresponding ground-truth rating entries. For health coverage, 'LifeFirst' offers both physical and mental plans rated under 'primary_health_coverage'. Physical coverage maps to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' (rating 9) and mental health coverage maps to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' in the mental health section (rating 4). Property coverage by 'LifeFirst' corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' (rating 9). Travel coverage corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under 'mobility_coverage' (rating 9). The 'adventure_sports_addon' corresponds to 'Adventure Travel Coverage' (rating 10) in travel enhancement services. The 'concierge_service' corresponds to 'Concierge Services' (rating 1) in travel enhancement services.
